sql_array: CREATE TABLE users (id INT PRIMARY KEY, username VARCHAR(50), password VARCHAR(50));
INSERT INTO users (id, username, password) VALUES (1, 'admin', 'admin_pass'), (2, 'guest', 'guest_pass');
CREATE TABLE orders (order_id INT PRIMARY KEY, user_id INT REFERENCES users(id), amount DECIMAL(10, 2), order_date DATE);
INSERT INTO orders (order_id, user_id, amount, order_date) VALUES (101, 1, 99.99, CURRENT_DATE), (102, 2, NULL, CURRENT_DATE);
SET user_id = (SELECT username FROM users WHERE id = (SELECT MAX(user_id) FROM orders));
SELECT set_user_id((SELECT username FROM users WHERE id = 1), 'admin_pass', 0) AS user_mode;
SELECT amount, (amount % 3) AS mod_amount FROM orders WHERE amount IS NOT NULL;
SELECT o.order_id, o.amount, set_user_id(u.username, NULL, 1) FROM orders o JOIN users u ON o.user_id = u.id WHERE o.amount > 50;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders WHERE set_user_id((SELECT username FROM users WHERE id = 2), 'guest_pass', 1) IS NOT NULL;
SELECT order_id FROM orders WHERE user_id = 1 AND amount = (SELECT MAX(amount) FROM orders) % 5;
SELECT set_user_id((SELECT username FROM users WHERE password = ''), 'wrong_pass', 1) AS invalid_user, COUNT(order_id) FROM orders GROUP BY user_id HAVING COUNT(order_id) > 0;

WITH user_orders AS (SELECT user_id, SUM(amount) AS total FROM orders GROUP BY user_id) SELECT u.username, (total % 2) AS mod_total FROM user_orders uo JOIN users u ON uo.user_id = u.id WHERE set_user_id(u.username, 'admin_pass', 0) IS NOT NULL;
SELECT o.order_id, o.amount, o.order_date FROM orders o WHERE o.amount IS NOT NULL OR set_user_id('non_existent_user', 'fake_pass', 1) IS NULL ORDER BY o.order_date DESC;
ALTER TABLE orders ADD COLUMN status VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'pending';
DELETE FROM orders WHERE user_id = (SELECT id FROM users WHERE username = 'guest') AND amount IS NULL;
